recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Blade of the 47 Ronin
recommendations.overview: A new class of warriors emerges among the Samurai clans to keep a sought-after sword from falling into the wrong hands.

recommendations.title: Aloha Scooby-Doo!
recommendations.overview: The Mystery Gang goes to Hawaii for the Big Kahuna of Hanahuna Surfing Contest. However, the gang and the locals find the island invaded by the vengeful Wiki Tiki spirit and his demons.

recommendations.title: Dragons: Dawn of the Dragon Racers
recommendations.overview: A hunt for a lost sheep turns into a competition between Hiccup and friends as they compete to become the first Dragon Racing champion of Berk.

recommendations.title: Bionicle: Mask of Light
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: With darkness encroaching on the island of Mata Nui, the only hope for the survival of the islanders rests with two Matoran villagers, who must find the seventh Toa and deliver to him the fabled Mask of Light.

recommendations.title: Monsters 103 Mercies Dragon Damnation
recommendations.overview: A samurai's path leads him to a young waitress whose hometown was destroyed by a dragon. He doesn't want any trouble — but it finds them anyway.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and WWE: Curse of the Speed Demon
recommendations.overview: When Scooby and Mystery Inc. visit an off-road racing competition, it's not long before strange events start to occur. A mysterious phantom racer, known only as Inferno, is causing chaos and is determined to sabotage the race. It's up to Scooby-Doo,

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Loch Ness Monster
recommendations.genres: Family, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: While the gang travel to Scotland to visit Daphne's cousin and witness the annual Highland Games, they find themselves terrorized by the legendary Loch Ness Monster.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Pirates Ahoy!
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure
recommendations.overview: It's horror on the high seas when Scooby-Doo and the gang take a creepy cruise into one of the world's most mysterious places, the Bermuda Triangle! If Scooby, Shaggy and the gang can't solve this mystery, they may have to walk the plank.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! in Where's My Mummy?
recommendations.genres: Mystery, Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. gang become involved in a supernatural mystery in Egypt.
